docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.18 FILED BY MYHRE, KRISTYN AS TO DEFENDANT ALFA RENTAL CORP. DBA STUDENT CAR RENTAL CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
